zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew de Toret於1169年出生在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Peter FitzToret40歲，母親Lucia Haget31歲。他於1193年與Agnes在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 白 奧斯維斯崔結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1235年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Antoine, Camille, Emile, Anatole, Armand, Chantal, Clemile, Clovis, Gillis.
French (Forêt): variant of Forest ‘forest’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Forest
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pascal, Amie, Armand, Bertice, Etienne, Fernand, Germaine, Jacques, Normand, Sylvain.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one, from Old French forest ‘forest’; or a habitational name from (La) Forest, the name of several places in various parts of France. Unlike modern French forêt, forest was not simply a word for extensive woodland, but referred specifically to large wooded areas reserved by law for the king and his nobles to hunt in (see also English Forrest ). Compare Deforest and Laforest .
English and Scottish: variant of   Forrest  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew de Toret was born in 1169, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, his father, Peter FitzToret, was 40 and his mother, Lucia Haget, was 31. He married Agnes in 1193, in Moreton by Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1235, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew de Toret(이)가 1169년 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter FitzToret(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia Haget(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 비 오스w스트리에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew de Toret родился в 1169 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter FitzToret было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia Haget, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1193 г. в местности моретон би освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1235 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.
